responseSchema.description: The type that defines the fields for the getUser method.

accountType.description: Indicates the user account type. This is determined when the user registers with eBay. If they register for a business account, this value will be BUSINESS. If they register for a private account, this value will be INDIVIDUAL. This designation is required by the tax laws in the following countries: EBAY_AT, EBAY_BE, EBAY_CH, EBAY_DE, EBAY_ES, EBAY_FR, EBAY_GB, EBAY_IE, EBAY_IT, EBAY_PL Valid Values: BUSINESS or INDIVIDUAL Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

businessAccount.description: The type that defines the fields for the business account information.

address.description: The type that defines the fields for an address.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the street address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the street address. This field is not always used, but can be used for 'Suite Number' or 'Apt Number'.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country of the address. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province of the address.

doingBusinessAs.description: An additional name that is used for their business on eBay. The business name is returned in the name field.

email.description: The email address of the business account.

name.description: The business name associated with the user's eBay account.

primaryContact.description: The type that defines the fields for the information of the contact person for the account.

firstName.description: The first name of the contact person.

lastName.description: The last name of the contact person.

primaryPhone.description: The type that defines the fields for the details of a phone.

countryCode.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country to which the phone number belongs.

number.description: The numeric string representing the phone number.

phoneType.description: The type of phone service. Valid Values: MOBILE or LAND_LINE Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list.

secondaryPhone.description: The type that defines the fields for the details of a phone.

countryCode.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country to which the phone number belongs.

number.description: The numeric string representing the phone number.

phoneType.description: The type of phone service. Valid Values: MOBILE or LAND_LINE Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list.

website.description: The business website address associated with the eBay account.

individualAccount.description: The type that defines the fields for the information of an individual account.

email.description: The eBay user's registration email address.

primaryPhone.description: The type that defines the fields for the details of a phone.

countryCode.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country to which the phone number belongs.

number.description: The numeric string representing the phone number.

phoneType.description: The type of phone service. Valid Values: MOBILE or LAND_LINE Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list.

registrationAddress.description: The type that defines the fields for an address.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the street address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the street address. This field is not always used, but can be used for 'Suite Number' or 'Apt Number'.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country of the address. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province of the address.

secondaryPhone.description: The type that defines the fields for the details of a phone.

countryCode.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country to which the phone number belongs.

number.description: The numeric string representing the phone number.

phoneType.description: The type of phone service. Valid Values: MOBILE or LAND_LINE Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list.

registrationMarketplaceId.description: The eBay site on which the account is registered. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

status.description: Indicates the user's account status. Possible values: CONFIRMED, UNCONFIRMED, ACCOUNTONHOLD and UNDETERMINED. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

userId.description: The eBay immutable user ID of the user's account and can always be used to identify the user.

username.description: The user name, which was specific by the user when they created the account. Note: This value can be changed by the user.
